title: [IOS] Location Sharing Dialogue - Don't Allow - Enable Now - Allow Once
scenario: Verify location sharing dialogue flow on iOS after onboarding with "Don't Allow", granting "Ask Next Time" permission, and handling subsequent permission popup options.
steps: Navigate to App settings > Find My Device
Observe permission popup with "Cancel" and "Enable Now"
Grant location permission with "Ask Next Time or When I Share"
Observe "Allow Poly Lens to use your location" popup with options "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", and "Don't Allow"
expected: After granting location permission with "Ask Next Time or When I Share" and returning to the app, the "Allow Poly Lens to use your location" popup appears with options "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", and "Don't Allow".
